# RMarkdown Report 
This report summarizes findings, methods, and policy implications. 
---
title: "DC Equity Insights – Equity Metrics Report"
author: "Tamrat Workineh"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
---

This report summarizes findings, methods, and policy implications.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)

base_dir <- normalizePath(file.path("..", "..", ".."), winslash = "/")
data_processed <- file.path(base_dir, "data_processed", "dc_combined.csv")
df <- read_csv(data_processed, show_col_types = FALSE)
